title: Tyre Position Intelligence
subtitle: Performance analysis by axle position - fastest wear, highest cost, failure-prone positions

sections.heatMap: Site × Position Failure Rate Heat Map

heatMapTable.legend: Red = high failure rate. Blank cells = no data.

corrective.allGoodDesc: No positions currently exceed the 20% failure rate threshold.
corrective.failureSummary: {rate}% failure rate - {multiplier}× fleet average. {highRiskCount} high/critical risk records from {count} total.

states.noPositionData: No position data available. Ensure tyre records include position field.

recommendation.steerCritical: Critical: High steer tyre failure rate indicates alignment or inflation issues. Inspect alignment immediately.
recommendation.steerCpkHigh: Steer CPK above fleet average. Review inflation pressure policy for steer axles.
recommendation.steerElevated: Elevated steer failures. Schedule alignment checks and pressure audits across fleet.
recommendation.driveElevated: Drive axle failures elevated. Check overloading and driver behaviour records.
recommendation.driveLifeLow: Drive tyre life below benchmark. Evaluate brand switch or rotation policy.
recommendation.driveAboveThreshold: Drive axle failure rate above threshold. Investigate load compliance and tyre rotation intervals.
recommendation.trailerAboveThreshold: Trailer failures above threshold. Inspect for road damage and misalignment.
recommendation.trailerTrendingUp: Trailer failure rate trending up. Review tyre inspection frequency for trailer axles.
recommendation.liftElevated: Lift axle failures elevated. Ensure correct inflation when axle is deployed.
recommendation.liftReview: Review lift axle deployment procedures and associated tyre pressure compliance.
recommendation.tagAboveNorm: Tag axle failures above fleet norm. Check for uneven load distribution and misalignment.
recommendation.genericHigh: {position} position showing high failure rate ({rate}%). Immediate review required.
recommendation.genericElevated: {position} position failure rate elevated. Schedule inspection and root cause review.
recommendation.genericCpkHigh: CPK for {position} is high ({cpk} /km). Evaluate tyre specification and brand selection.
